subject: WM-0179 blocked
body: The sole two-window Get-Process admission pair executed on clean checkpoint 0882988, but PowerShell Write-Output was captured by assignment into process-local arrays; array truthiness made exit 0 non-evidentiary and only GIT_CLEAN_AFTER=True survived. CPU thresholds cannot be audited. Per the two-window/no-retry policy, benchmark invocation count is 0 and no additional sampling or benchmark was run. Functional/typecheck/focused/quality/M1-M3 evidence passes; see coordination/reports/WM-0179.md.
